subtitles:
{"ar":[{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:01.000000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:07.400000000","text":"مرحبًا! ستصل عما قريب إلى نيفارو،
أحدث المسارات التجارية المتفرعة من طريق هايديان."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:08.600000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:12.400000000","text":"ندعوك لاستكشاف متاجرنا وأسواقنا الكثيرة."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:13.000000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:15.500000000","text":"تعرّف على صنّاع الروبوتات - فإنّهم الأفضل في المجرّة."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:15.650000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:16.450000000","text":"ما الذي يجري هنا؟"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:16.750000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:19.350000000","text":"هل تحتاج إلى تلميع؟ تبدو وكأنّ الصدأ قد نال منك!"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:20.000000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:22.350000000","text":"استمتع بالإثارة في حلبات القتال--"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:23.150000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:24.600000000","text":"مهلًا! من الذي ألقى هذا--"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:25.100000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:28.800000000","text":"تأمّل روعة أنفاق الحمم البركانية السوداء."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:29.000000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:35.300000000","text":"وتفضّل بزيارة المدرّج الجديد، لمشاهدة لقطات حصرية ومبكرة
لأهم الأحداث التي تجري في أنحاء المجرّة."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:36.000000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:41.100000000","text":"نتطلع بشوق للترحيب بكم،
ونأمل أن تحظوا بإقامة مزدهرة في..."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:42.000000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:43.600000000","text":"جوهرة الحافة الخارجية!"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:44.600000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:47.300000000","text":"أجب. نيفارو تتعرض للهجوم! "},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:47.380000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:49.680000000","text":"فلول الإمبراطورية تحاول تعزيز ما تبقى من قوتها."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:50.380000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:52.680000000","text":"لستُ على الكوكب الآن، وعليكم حماية الكوكب في غيابي."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:53.140000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:59.250000000","text":"اقضِ على الأعداء، وبعدها توجّه للمارشال IG-11.
استعد. ولا تخذلني.
"}],"de":[{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:01.000000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:07.400000000","text":"Hallo! Du landest gleich auf Nevarro, dem neuesten
Handelsknoten der Hydianischen Straße."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:08.600000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:12.400000000","text":"Wir laden dich ein
unsere vielen Geschäfte und Märkte zu erkunden."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:13.000000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:15.500000000","text":"Besuche unsere Droidenschmiede –
die besten in der Galaxis."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:15.650000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:16.450000000","text":"Was ist hier los?"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:16.750000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:19.350000000","text":"Soll was poliert werden? Du siehst rostig aus!"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:20.000000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:22.350000000","text":"Erlebe die Kampfarenen von ..."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:23.150000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:24.600000000","text":"Hey! Wer hat ..."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:25.100000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:28.800000000","text":"Bewundere die Schwarzlava-Tunnel."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:29.000000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:35.300000000","text":"Und komm zum neuen Amphitheater, um dir exklusive
Sneak Peeks aus der ganzen Galaxis anzusehen."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:36.000000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:41.100000000","text":"Wir freuen uns auf dich und wünschen dir
einen erfolgreichen Aufenthalt auf dem ..."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:42.000000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:43.600000000","text":"Juwel des äußeren Randes!"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:44.600000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:47.300000000","text":"Bitte kommen. Nevarro wird angegriffen. "},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:47.380000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:49.680000000","text":"Die Überreste des Imperiums versuchen,
an Stärke zu gewinnen."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:50.380000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:52.680000000","text":"Ich bin im All und der Planet muss beschützt werden."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:53.140000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:59.250000000","text":"Besiege den Feind
und melde dich dann bei Marschall IG-11.Rüste dich aus. Und enttäusche mich nicht.
"}],"en":[{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:01.000000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:07.400000000","text":"Greetings! You’ll be arriving shortly on Nevarro,
the newest trade spur of the Hydian Way."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:08.600000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:12.400000000","text":"We invite you to explore our many shops and markets."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:13.000000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:15.500000000","text":"Meet our droidsmiths - the best in the galaxy."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:15.650000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:16.450000000","text":"What’s going on here?"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:16.750000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:19.350000000","text":"You need a polish? You’re looking rusty!"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:20.000000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:22.350000000","text":"Thrill at the Fighting Pits of--"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:23.150000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:24.600000000","text":"Hey! Who threw--"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:25.100000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:28.800000000","text":"Marvel at the black lava tunnels."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:29.000000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:35.300000000","text":"And visit our new amphitheater, to view exclusive sneak peeks
of happenings throughout the galaxy."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:36.000000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:41.100000000","text":"We look forward to welcoming you,
and hope you’ll have a prosperous stay on..."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:42.000000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:43.600000000","text":"The Gem of the Outer Rim!"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:44.600000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:47.300000000","text":"Come in. Nevarro is under attack. "},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:47.380000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:49.680000000","text":"Imperial remnants are trying to strengthen what’s left of the Empire."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:50.380000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:52.680000000","text":"I’m off-world and the planet needs protecting."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:53.140000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:59.250000000","text":"Defeat the enemy, then report to Marshal IG-11.
Gear up. And don’t let me down.
"}],"es":[{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:00.710000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:04.070000000","text":"¡Saludos! Pronto llegarás a Nevarro,"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:04.578000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:07.390000000","text":"el flamante núcleo comercial
de la Vía Hydiana."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:08.600000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:12.310000000","text":"Te invitamos a explorar
nuestras numerosas tiendas y mercados."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:12.858000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:15.639000000","text":"Conoce a nuestros reparadores de droides,
los mejores de la galaxia."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:15.707000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:16.750000000","text":"¿Qué ocurre aquí?"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:16.859000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:19.249000000","text":"¿Necesitas un pulido
 ¡Pareces un poco oxidado!"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:20.000000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:22.398000000","text":"La emoción de los reñideros de..."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:23.150000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:24.593000000","text":"¡Oye! ¿Quién ha tirado...?"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:25.100000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:28.037000000","text":"Maravíllate con los túneles de lava negra."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:28.960000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:31.170000000","text":"Descubre nuestro nuevo anfiteatro"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:31.335000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:35.300000000","text":"para ver avances exclusivos
de eventos de toda la galaxia."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:36.000000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:41.100000000","text":"Estamos deseando darte la bienvenida
y esperamos que disfrutes tu estancia en..."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:42.000000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:43.600000000","text":"¡La joya del Borde Exterior!"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:44.199000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:46.683000000","text":"Adelante. Atacan Nevarro."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:47.168000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:49.996000000","text":"Remanentes imperiales 
intentan afianzar lo que queda del Imperio."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:50.380000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:52.739000000","text":"Estoy fuera y el planeta necesita protección."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:53.140000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:56.359000000","text":"Derrota al enemigo y
preséntate ante el alguacil Marshal IG-11."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:56.781000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:59.335000000","text":"Equípate.
Y no me decepciones."}],"es-419":[{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:00.600000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:01.633000000","text":"¡Saludos!"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:01.760000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:04.286000000","text":"Pronto estarás llegando a Nevarro,"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:04.620000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:07.446000000","text":"el nuevo centro de comercio
de la Vía Hydian."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:08.600000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:12.400000000","text":"Te invitamos a explorar
sus múltiples tiendas y mercados."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:12.893000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:14.481000000","text":"Tenemos fabricantes de droides..."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:14.505000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:15.557000000","text":"los mejores de la galaxia."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:15.650000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:16.723000000","text":"¿Qué pasa aquí?"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:16.750000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:19.210000000","text":"¿Necesitas una pulida? ¡Te ves oxidado!"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:20.000000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:22.350000000","text":"Emociónate en los fosos de lucha de..."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:23.150000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:24.709000000","text":"¡Oye! ¿Quién arrojó...?"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:25.100000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:27.940000000","text":"Maravíllate en los túneles de lava negra."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:29.000000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:31.060000000","text":"Y visita nuestro nuevo anfiteatro"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:31.085000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:35.300000000","text":"para ver adelantos exclusivos
de los sucesos de toda la galaxia."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:36.000000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:38.326000000","text":"Ya queremos recibirte,"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:38.350000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:41.222000000","text":"y esperamos que tengas
una estancia próspera en..."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:41.675000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:43.600000000","text":"¡la joya del Borde..."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:44.600000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:47.300000000","text":"Adelante. Nevarro está bajo ataque."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:47.380000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:49.680000000","text":"Los remanentes imperiales
intentan fortalecer el Imperio."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:50.380000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:52.680000000","text":"Estoy fuera y el planeta
necesita protección."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:53.140000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:54.239000000","text":"Derrota al enemigo"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:54.453000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:56.453000000","text":"y luego repórtate con el comisario IG-11."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:56.833000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:59.373000000","text":"Prepárate.
Y no me falles."}],"fr":[{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:01.000000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:07.400000000","text":"Salutations ! Vous approchez de Nevarro,
le nouveau comptoir commercial de la Voie hydienne."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:08.600000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:12.200000000","text":"Nous vous invitons à explorer
nos nombreuses boutiques et marchés."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:12.800000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:15.400000000","text":"Faites connaissance avec
nos fabricants de droïdes, les meilleurs de la galaxie."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:15.800000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:16.900000000","text":"Que se passe-t-il, ici ?"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:16.999000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:19.350000000","text":"Vous avez besoin d'un effet chromé ? Vous m'avez l'air bien rouillé !"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:20.000000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:22.350000000","text":"C'est le frisson dans l'arène de combat pour…"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:23.150000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:24.600000000","text":"Hé ! Qui a lancé…"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:25.100000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:27.999000000","text":"Venez admirer les tunnels de lave noire."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:29.000000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:35.300000000","text":"Et visitez notre nouvel amphithéâtre pour des aperçus exclusifs
d'événements aux quatre coins de la galaxie."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:36.000000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:41.400000000","text":"Nous sommes impatients de vous accueillir,
et espérons que vous passerez un séjour prospère…"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:41.650000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:43.600000000","text":"sur le joyau de la Bordure Extérieure !"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:44.600000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:47.300000000","text":"Entrez. Nevarro est attaqué. "},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:47.380000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:49.750000000","text":"Les vestiges des troupes de l'Empire
essaient de reconstituer une présence impériale."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:50.380000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:52.680000000","text":"Je suis en déplacement sur un autre monde,
et la planète a besoin de protection."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:53.140000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:59.250000000","text":"Venez à bout de l'ennemi,
puis faites votre rapport au marshal IG-11. Équipez-vous. Et ne me décevez pas.
"}],"it":[{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:01.000000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:07.400000000","text":"Salve! Stai per arrivare su Nevarro,
il più recente snodo commerciale della Rotta Hydiana."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:08.600000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:12.400000000","text":"Ti invitiamo a scoprire
i nostri numerosi negozi e mercati."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:12.902000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:15.491000000","text":"Vai dai nostri droidi riparatori,
i migliori della galassia."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:15.536000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:16.450000000","text":"Che succede qui?"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:16.552000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:19.350000000","text":"Ti serve una lucidata? Hai un aspetto un po' arrugginito!"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:20.000000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:22.350000000","text":"Il brivido nelle arene di combattimento di..."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:23.150000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:24.600000000","text":"Ehi! Chi ha lanciato..."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:25.100000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:28.068000000","text":"Lasciati incantare dalle gallerie di lava nera."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:29.000000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:35.300000000","text":"E visita il nostro nuovo anfiteatro per anteprime esclusive
degli eventi in tutta la galassia."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:36.000000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:41.100000000","text":"Non vediamo l'ora di darti il benvenuto
e ti auguriamo un soggiorno piacevole..."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:42.000000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:43.600000000","text":"sulla gemma dell'Orlo Esterno!"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:44.600000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:47.300000000","text":"Ascolta. Nevarro è sotto attacco."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:47.380000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:49.680000000","text":"I superstiti imperiali stanno cercando
di rafforzare ciò che resta dell'Impero."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:50.380000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:52.680000000","text":"Io sono lontano dal pianeta,
ma ha bisogno di essere protetto."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:53.140000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:56.180000000","text":"Sconfiggi il nemico,
poi fai rapporto allo sceriffo IG-11."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:56.773000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:59.250000000","text":"Armati,
e non deludermi."}],"ja":[{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:00.766000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:04.400000000","text":"こんにちは！
まもなくネヴァロに到着します"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:04.400000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:07.733000000","text":"ハイディアン・ウェイの
最新交易ルートです"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:08.600000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:12.600000000","text":"数多くのショップやマーケットを
ぜひご散策ください"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:13.000000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:15.633000000","text":"銀河随一のドロイド職人を
ご紹介いたします"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:15.633000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:16.733000000","text":"何事だ？"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:16.733000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:17.733000000","text":"磨くか？"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:17.733000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:19.333000000","text":"サビだらけだ"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:20.000000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:22.433000000","text":"闘技場の興奮をぜひ…"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:23.133000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:24.600000000","text":"ちょっと！ 誰が…"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:25.100000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:28.200000000","text":"黒溶岩のトンネルの神秘を
ご堪能ください"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:29.000000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:35.300000000","text":"新設のシアターでは 銀河中の出来事を
映した特別先行映像をご覧ください"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:36.000000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:38.566000000","text":"ご来訪を心より
お待ちしております"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:38.566000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:41.100000000","text":"どうぞ 豊かなひと時を…"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:41.500000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:43.233000000","text":"アウターリムの宝石で！"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:44.133000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:47.133000000","text":"応答せよ
ネヴァロが攻撃を受けている "},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:47.133000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:50.366000000","text":"帝国軍の残党が 帝国の残存勢力を
強化しようとしている"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:50.366000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:53.133000000","text":"俺は今 星を離れているから
惑星を守ってくれ"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:53.133000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:57.033000000","text":"敵を倒し IG-11保安官に
報告するんだ"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:57.033000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:59.833000000","text":"装備を整えろ
期待を裏切るなよ
"}],"ko":[{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:01.000000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:01.751000000","text":"안녕하세요!"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:01.801000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:03.740000000","text":"곧 네바로에 도착합니다"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:04.643000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:06.559000000","text":"하이디안 웨이에서
새롭게 떠오르는"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:06.584000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:08.071000000","text":"무역 거점입니다"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:08.600000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:10.500000000","text":"다양한 상점과"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:10.512000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:12.400000000","text":"시장을 둘러보세요"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:13.000000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:14.250000000","text":"드로이드 수리공도
만나보세요"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:14.262000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:15.500000000","text":"은하계 최고의
솜씨를 자랑합니다"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:15.654000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:16.454000000","text":"무슨 일이야?"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:16.750000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:17.974000000","text":"광 좀 내줘?"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:17.999000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:19.350000000","text":"녹이 잔뜩 슬었는데!"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:20.000000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:22.350000000","text":"스릴 넘치는
싸움 구덩이와..."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:23.150000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:23.875000000","text":"이봐요!"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:23.887000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:24.600000000","text":"누가 던졌어요!"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:24.975000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:28.897000000","text":"경이로운 검은 용암
터널도 둘러보세요"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:29.000000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:31.353000000","text":"또 새롭게 열린 원형극장도
방문하셔서"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:31.378000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:33.594000000","text":"은하계 곳곳에서
벌어지는 사건의"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:33.619000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:35.300000000","text":"독점 시사회에도
참석해 보세요"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:36.000000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:38.550000000","text":"하루빨리 여러분을
맞이하고 싶네요"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:38.562000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:39.831000000","text":"아주 생산적이고"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:39.843000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:41.451000000","text":"성공적인 여행이
되시길 기원하며..."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:42.000000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:43.600000000","text":"아우터 림의 보석에서
뵙겠습니다!"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:44.600000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:45.283000000","text":"응답 바람"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:45.307000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:46.645000000","text":"네바로가 공격받고 있다"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:47.255000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:48.134000000","text":"제국군 잔당이"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:48.159000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:49.680000000","text":"제국의 잔해를
보강하려 한다"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:50.380000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:50.947000000","text":"나는 지금"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:50.972000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:51.930000000","text":"행성을 벗어나 있다"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:51.955000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:52.680000000","text":"그쪽에서 보호해야 해"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:53.033000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:54.471000000","text":"적을 쓰러트리고"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:54.496000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:56.195000000","text":"IG-11 보안관에게
보고하도록"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:56.207000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:57.728000000","text":"장비를 챙겨라"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:57.740000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:59.250000000","text":"실망시키지 말고"}],"pl":[{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:01.000000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:07.400000000","text":"Witaj! Niebawem trafisz na Nevarro,
najnowszego centrum handlowego Drogi Hydlińskiej."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:08.600000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:12.400000000","text":"Zapraszamy do odwiedzania
naszych sklepów i targów."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:13.000000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:15.500000000","text":"Spotkasz tu
najlepszych droido-kowali w galaktyce."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:15.650000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:16.450000000","text":"Co tu się dzieje?"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:16.750000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:19.350000000","text":"Wypolerować? Trochę zardzewiało!"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:20.000000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:22.350000000","text":"Ciesz się Arenami Walk..."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:23.150000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:24.600000000","text":"Hej! Kto rzucił..."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:25.100000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:28.800000000","text":"Rozkoszuj się tunelami czarnej lawy."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:29.000000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:35.300000000","text":"Odwiedź nasz amfiteatr, aby rzucić okiem na ekskluzywne
zajawki wydarzeń z całej galaktyki."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:36.000000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:41.100000000","text":"Chcemy cię gorąco powitać.
Z pewnością zapamiętasz pobyt na..."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:42.000000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:43.600000000","text":"Klejnocie Zewnętrznych Rubieży!"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:44.600000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:47.300000000","text":"Wejdź. Nevarro jest atakowane!"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:47.380000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:49.680000000","text":"Imperialne niedobitki
próbują umocnić pozostałości Imperium."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:50.380000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:52.680000000","text":"Jestem poza planetą.
Ten świat potrzebuje ochrony."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:53.140000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:59.250000000","text":"Pokonaj przeciwników
i zgłoś się do Marszałek IG-11.Przygotuj sprzęt. 
I nie zawiedź mnie."}],"pt-br":[{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:01.000000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:07.400000000","text":"Saudações! Você chegará a Nevarro,
o mais novo centro comercial da Via Hydiana."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:08.600000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:12.400000000","text":"Convidamos você
a explorar as várias lojas e mercados."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:13.000000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:15.500000000","text":"Conheça nossos forjadroides,
os melhores da galáxia."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:15.650000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:16.450000000","text":"O que está acontecendo aqui?"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:16.750000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:19.350000000","text":"Quer um polimento?
Você parece meio enferrujado!"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:20.000000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:22.350000000","text":"Sinta a emoção das Arenas de Combate..."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:23.150000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:24.600000000","text":"Ei! Quem jogou..."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:25.100000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:28.800000000","text":"Admire os túneis com lava preta."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:29.000000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:35.300000000","text":"E visite nosso novo anfiteatro para ver prévias exclusivas
de acontecimentos de toda a galáxia."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:36.000000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:41.100000000","text":"Sua presença é muito importante pra nós.
Esperamos que você tenha uma ótima estadia na..."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:42.000000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:43.600000000","text":"Joia da Orla Exterior!"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:44.600000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:47.300000000","text":"Entre. Nevarro está sob ataque!"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:47.380000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:49.680000000","text":"Remanescentes imperiais
estão tentando reerguer o que restou do Império."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:50.380000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:52.680000000","text":"Não estou no planeta,
e ele precisa de proteção."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:53.140000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:59.250000000","text":"Derrote o inimigo e apresente-se ao Delegado IG-11.
Equipe-se. E não me decepcione."}],"ru":[{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:01.000000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:04.200000000","text":"Добрый день! Совсем скоро вы прибудете на Неварро —"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:04.212000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:07.400000000","text":"новый торговый узел на Хайдианском пути."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:08.600000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:12.400000000","text":"Приглашаем вас прогуляться
по нашим рынкам и магазинам."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:13.000000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:15.500000000","text":"Загляните к мастерам-дроидотехники —
лучшим во всей галактике."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:15.650000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:16.680000000","text":"В чём дело?"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:16.750000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:19.350000000","text":"Полировку не желаешь? Видок у тебя ржавый!"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:20.000000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:22.350000000","text":"Опробуйте свои силы на арене, самой..."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:23.150000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:24.600000000","text":"Эй! Кто бросил..."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:25.100000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:28.800000000","text":"Полюбуйтесь величественными туннелями
с чёрной лавой."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:29.000000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:31.670000000","text":"И посетите новый амфитеатр,"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:31.700000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:35.078000000","text":"чтобы ознакомиться
с эксклюзивами о жизни в галактике."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:36.000000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:41.100000000","text":"Мы рады видеть вас в нашем городе.
Желаем вам приятного отдыха на..."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:42.000000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:43.600000000","text":"жемчужине Внешнего кольца!"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:44.600000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:47.300000000","text":"Приём. На Неварро напали."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:47.380000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:49.810000000","text":"Уцелевшие силы Империи
пытаются вернуть утраченные позиции."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:50.380000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:52.680000000","text":"Я далеко от планеты, и ей нужны защитники."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:53.140000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:56.195000000","text":"Одолейте противников
и отчитайтесь перед маршалом IG-11."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:56.207000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:59.250000000","text":"Подготовьтесь к бою. И не подведите меня."}],"tr":[{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:01.000000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:07.400000000","text":"Merhaba! Birazdan Nevarro'ya ulaşacaksınız,
Hydian Yolu'nun en yeni ticaret merkezi!"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:08.600000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:12.400000000","text":"Sizi dükkânlarımızı ve pazarlarımızı
keşfetmeye davet ediyoruz."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:13.000000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:15.500000000","text":"Droid ustalarımızla tanışın,
galaksinin en iyileri onlar."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:15.650000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:16.450000000","text":"Neler oluyor?"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:16.750000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:19.350000000","text":"- Cila ister misin?
- Paslanmışsın!"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:20.000000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:22.350000000","text":"Dövüş Arenası'nda heyecanı..."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:23.150000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:24.600000000","text":"Hey! Kim attı onu?"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:25.100000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:28.800000000","text":"Kara lav tünellerinde gezintiye çıkın."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:29.000000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:35.300000000","text":"Yeni amfitiyatromuzu da unutmayın
ve galakside olup biteni herkesten önce görün."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:36.000000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:41.100000000","text":"Sizi ağırlamak için sabırsızlanıyoruz.
Umarız burada keyifli vakit geçirirsiniz çünkü burası..."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:42.000000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:43.600000000","text":"Dış Halka'nın Mücevheri!"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:44.600000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:47.300000000","text":"Yanıt ver. Nevarro saldırıya uğradı."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:47.380000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:50.380000000","text":"İmparatorluk'tan kalan güçler,
kuvvetlerini toplamaya çalışıyor."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:50.380000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:53.080000000","text":"Ben başka bir yerdeyim
ve gezegenin korunması gerekiyor."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:53.140000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:59.250000000","text":"Düşmanı alt et ve Şerif IG-11'e rapor ver.
Ekipmanını kuşan. Yüzümü kara çıkarma."}],"zh-Hans":[{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:00.893000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:04.145000000","text":"您好！您即将抵达纳瓦罗"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:04.573000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:07.400000000","text":"海迪亚航路上最新的贸易枢纽"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:08.600000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:12.400000000","text":"我们诚邀您来探索这里各式各样的商店和市场"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:12.993000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:15.493000000","text":"认识一下银河系中最优秀的机器人铁匠"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:15.650000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:16.450000000","text":"怎么了？"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:16.743000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:18.789000000","text":"需要抛光吗？你都生锈啦！"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:20.000000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:22.350000000","text":"这里有紧张刺激的角斗坑"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:23.150000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:24.600000000","text":"嘿！谁扔的！"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:25.106000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:27.883000000","text":"这里有令人惊叹的黑熔岩下水道"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:28.993000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:31.074000000","text":"欢迎来到圆形剧场"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:31.164000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:35.108000000","text":"看一看银河系中正在发生的精彩故事"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:36.263000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:38.360000000","text":"我们期待您的到来"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:38.443000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:41.100000000","text":"衷心希望您能在外环明珠"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:41.630000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:43.600000000","text":"度过一段美好的时光！"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:44.599000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:46.763000000","text":"紧急情况 纳瓦罗正遭遇袭击"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:47.172000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:49.872000000","text":"帝国残余势力正伺机卷土重来"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:50.380000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:52.680000000","text":"我还在星系之外 但星球急需保护"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:53.140000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:56.485000000","text":"去击败敌人 然后向IG-11警长报告"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:56.913000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:59.250000000","text":"做好准备 别让我失望"}],"zh-Hant":[{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:01.000000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:07.400000000","text":"你好呀！你很快就會抵達納瓦羅，
海迪安航道最新的貿易支線"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:08.600000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:12.400000000","text":"歡迎探索我們眾多的商店與市集"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:13.000000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:15.500000000","text":"認識我們的機器人技師——銀河系中最棒的"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:15.650000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:16.450000000","text":"這是怎麼回事？"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:16.750000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:19.350000000","text":"需要保養一下嗎？你看起來都生鏽了！"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:20.000000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:22.350000000","text":"鬥技場的刺激——"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:23.150000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:24.600000000","text":"嘿！誰丟的——"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:25.100000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:28.800000000","text":"驚嘆於黑色熔岩隧道的奇景"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:29.000000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:35.300000000","text":"並造訪我們全新的圓形劇場，搶先欣賞銀河各地最新動態的獨家預告"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:36.000000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:41.100000000","text":"我們期待你的到來，
並希望你能在...度過愉快的時光。"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:42.000000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:43.600000000","text":"外環明珠！"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:44.600000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:47.300000000","text":"收到請回答！納瓦羅遭到攻擊了 "},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:47.380000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:49.680000000","text":"帝國殘黨正試圖重振殘存的帝國勢力"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:50.380000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:52.680000000","text":"我人不在星球上，而這裡需要有人守護"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:53.140000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:59.250000000","text":"擊敗敵人，然後向元帥IG-11報告
整裝備戰，別讓我失望
"}]}
